name: Druif Beach
description: Walk south to reach Eagle Beach easily — popular sunset happy hour spot among locals and repeat visitors.

rockiness.beach: White sand with low rock promontories at the edges 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Mostly sandy; gradual slope similar to Eagle Beach

characteristics.depth_profile: Shallow sandy entry similar to Eagle Beach; gradual slope.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Low rock promontories at edges add texture but main swim zone is sandy
characteristics.access: Free parking; closer to Oranjestad and cruise terminal than Palm Beach
characteristics.facilities: Beach Bar Aruba on the sand; some palapas
fun_facts: Walk south to reach Eagle Beach easily — popular sunset happy hour spot among locals and repeat visitors.
